# Because You Are Busy — Full Site Content

> Because You Are Busy (BYAB) is an operations, transformation, and growth consultancy for founders and managing partners since 2005. This document contains the complete editorial content of becausebusy.com.

---

## Hero

**We run what you can't get to anymore.**

Because you are busy building, leading, and deciding — we handle the operations, transformation, and growth that keep falling through the cracks. Since 2005.

---

## Services

### 1. Operational Backbone
Externalized general secretariat, admin, and finance so founders stop drowning in back-office and start leading. We become your invisible operations layer — payroll, contracts, compliance, reporting — handled with the rigor of an in-house team and the flexibility of an external partner.

### 2. Transformation & Data
Systems architecture, project governance, and data strategy that turn operational chaos into measurable clarity. We design and deploy the information systems, dashboards, and governance frameworks that let you make decisions based on facts, not feelings.

### 3. Growth Engine
Outbound, acquisition funnels, and predictable sales machines that make revenue growth inevitable. We build your ICP, package your offers, set up outbound sequences, and create the metrics layer that turns pipeline into revenue.

### 4. Legal Practice Ops
Purpose-built admin, finance, and organizational support for law firms where nothing can be improvised. Born from Anne Grosz's 8 years as Secretary General at Vatier & Associés, this service is designed for the specific operational demands of legal practices.

---

## Manifesto

We exist because founders and managing partners are too busy to do everything themselves. Not because they lack talent — because they lack time and structure.

Since 2005, Because You Are Busy has been the partner that handles what falls through the cracks: the back-office that piles up, the transformation projects that stall, the growth that stays theoretical.

We don't advise. We do. We embed. We run.

---

## Track Record

- **B2B SaaS Scale-Up** — Growth Engineering (2025): ICP definition, outbound infrastructure, acquisition funnel setup, and predictable pipeline metrics for a scaling SaaS company.
- **National Law Firm** — Operations Restructuring (2024): Full operational overhaul including administrative processes, financial reporting, and organizational structure for a multi-office law firm.
- **Tech PME** — Transformation & Data (2025): Information systems architecture, data governance framework, and project management methodology for a growing tech SME.

---

## Key Metrics

- **20 years** serving founders since 2005
- **57%** operating profitability
- **3** complementary expertise pillars (Operations, Transformation, Growth)
- **0€** external debt raised — self-funded, craft model

---

## Team

### Anne Grosz — Co-Manager & Head of Operations
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/annegrosz

20 years of hands-on operational leadership. Former Secretary General at Vatier & Associés (Paris law firm). Founded B Y A B in 2005, then Because You Are Busy in 2015. Expert in externalized general secretariat, administrative management, financial operations, and law firm operations. Anne is the operational backbone of BYAB — the person who makes sure nothing falls through the cracks while founders focus on leading.

### Cécile Noiriel — Operations Conductor
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/c%C3%A9cile-noiriel-18396327/

The original "chef d'orchestre" of Because You Are Busy since 2005. Cécile has been integral to the company from the very beginning, coordinating operational delivery and administrative organization. She is the continuity and reliability that allows BYAB's model to scale across multiple clients without losing quality.

### Georges Grosz — Co-Manager, Transformation & Data
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/georges-grosz-8aa9613

22 years as Senior Executive Consultant at CGI. Professor at Université Paris 1 Panthéon-Sorbonne. Expert in transformation, information systems architecture, project governance, and data strategy. Georges joined Because You Are Busy as co-manager in 2025, adding a deep transformation and data layer to the consultancy's capabilities.

### Romain Cornu — Growth Engine
LinkedIn: https://fr.linkedin.com/in/romaincornu

B2B growth specialist. Former Head of Marketing at Datananas, Head of Growth at Clovis, Growth Advisor at MerciApp, Teacher Outbound at GrowthMakers, CEO of Oysterz. Expert in outbound B2B, acquisition funnels, ICP definition, packaged offers, and scalable sales machines. Romain joined Because You Are Busy to build the growth engineering capability — turning pipeline into predictable revenue.

---

## Company History

- **2005** — B Y A B (SIREN 481 631 471) created. First "right-hand for busy founders" model. Ultra-lean, ultra-profitable structure — revenue ~130,000€, 57%+ operating profitability, zero external debt.
- **2015** — Because You Are Busy (SIREN 814 783 056) created by Anne Grosz. Specialization in externalized general secretariat for law firms and SMEs. Anne brings 8 years as Secretary General at Vatier & Associés.
- **2020** — Transformation from SAS to SARL. Craft model over startup model. Confidential accounts, trust-based client relationships.
- **2025** — Georges Grosz joins Because You Are Busy as co-manager. Transformation & data layer added. 22 years at CGI, professor at Sorbonne.
- **2025–2026** — Romain Cornu joins Because You Are Busy. Growth engineering capability: ICP, packaged offers, outbound funnels, performance metrics.

---

## About

Because You Are Busy was born from a simple observation: founders and managing partners are brilliant at what they do, but the operational weight of running a company — admin, finance, HR, data, growth — buries them.

We started in 2005 with a radical idea: instead of advising from the outside, embed directly into the operations. Run the back-office. Own the transformation. Build the growth engine. Not as consultants who leave reports — as operators who deliver results.

Two decades later, that model hasn't changed. What has changed is the depth: from pure operations, we've added transformation & data expertise and growth engineering. Three pillars, one promise: because you are busy, we do the work that frees your time.

---

## Testimonial

"Their team became invisible — in the best way. Everything just worked."
— Managing Partner, National Law Firm

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is Because You Are Busy?**
Because You Are Busy (BYAB) is an operations, transformation, and growth consultancy founded in 2005. We help founders and managing partners who are too busy to do it all by externalizing operations, driving data-powered transformation, and engineering predictable B2B growth.

**What services does Because You Are Busy offer?**
Four core services: (1) Operational Backbone — externalized general secretariat, admin, and finance; (2) Transformation & Data — systems architecture, project governance, and data strategy; (3) Growth Engine — outbound, acquisition funnels, and predictable sales machines; (4) Legal Practice Ops — purpose-built support for law firms.

**Who founded Because You Are Busy?**
Anne Grosz and Cécile Noiriel founded the original BYAB in 2005. The team now includes Georges Grosz (Transformation & Data, co-manager since 2025) and Romain Cornu (Growth Engine).

**Where is Because You Are Busy located?**
18 rue Arago, 94400 Vitry-sur-Seine, France. Operating across Paris and La Rochelle.

**How long has Because You Are Busy been operating?**
Over 20 years — since April 2005. Two decades of hands-on operational leadership, transformation consulting, and growth engineering.

**What types of clients does Because You Are Busy serve?**
Founders, managing partners, CEOs, and law firm partners who are scaling their business but can't handle everything alone. Our clients range from tech SMEs and B2B SaaS companies to national law firms and professional services firms.

**How is Because You Are Busy different from freelancers or large consulting firms?**
We're neither. We're a senior, multi-disciplinary team that embeds into your operations. No juniors on client work. No 200-page reports that collect dust. We operate — we don't just advise. Our craft model means every client gets the founders and senior team directly.

---

Email: hello@becausebusy.com

Locations: Paris & La Rochelle, France

## Brand Promise

"Because you are busy, we do the work that frees your time — and we do it in a way that makes your growth more readable, more predictable, and better controlled."
